## Table 1: world_s_wildlife_ (13,549 rows × 4 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 6.csv (Dataset: world’s wildlife?)

### Schema (4 fields)
  - country -- type: object, values: Afghanistan, Africa, Africa (FAO), Albania, Algeria, ..., World, Yemen, Yugoslavia, Zambia, Zimbabwe
  - code country -- type: object, values: 0, AFG, AGO, ALB, ARE, ..., VUT, YEM, ZAF, ZMB, ZWE
  - Year -- type: int64, values: 1275, 1305, 1355, 1405, 1455, ..., 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023
  - Maize yield -- type: object, values: 1.41, 46.507.044, 11.136.999, 3.6474, 198.092, ..., 2.1945, 3.5105, 1.2398, 7.509, 5.6183
